prompt: I'm building a GenAI-powered internal knowledge assistant for a 500-person consultancy. Employees ask questions in natural language; the system retrieves from our document corpus (Confluence, SharePoint, past project reports) and generates answers. Map the components and tell me what to build in-house, buy as SaaS, or consume as a utility API.

assertions.text: Has a user-facing anchor at high visibility (>=0.9)
At least 8 components identified (GenAI stack is multi-layered)
Visibility constraint respected for all edges
LLM API component exists at Commodity/utility stage (epsilon >= 0.75)
Vector DB or retrieval component exists
Cites at least one specific Wardley gameplay by name
Caveat present that evolution is scenario not forecast
